Method.Name: process

makeCompositeKey
Method.Source: // Composite key: particular + item + dims + month + year. private str makeCompositeKey( Name reportParticular, str itemId, str commodity, str subCommodity, str vertical, str subVertical, int monthNumber, int yearNumber) { return strFmt("%1|%2|%3|%4|%5|%6|%7|%8", reportParticular, itemId, commodity, subCommodity, vertical, subVertical, monthNumber, yearNumber); }
